inputs.paper: A paper proposing a cache eviction policy that claims a 15% hit-rate gain over LRU on web traces.
inputs.goal: Decide whether to implement the policy in our cache layer.

expected_outputs.implementation_plan: Slice 1: implement the policy behind a flag. Slice 2: replay our traces. Slice 3: compare hit-rate vs LRU. Assumption (not in paper): our traces resemble theirs.

notes: Translates a paper into slices and validation tasks, separating its claims from reader assumptions.
